lines.english: Lesson 59
lines.chinese: 第59课
lines.raw: Lesson 59 | 第59课

lines.english: Collecting
lines.chinese: 收藏
lines.raw: Collecting | 收藏

lines.english: What in particular does a person gain when he or she becomes a serious collector?
lines.chinese: 一个人成为一名真正的收藏家后，他或她究竟获得了什么？
lines.raw: What in particular does a person gain when he or she becomes a serious collector? | 一个人成为一名真正的收藏家后，他或她究竟获得了什么？

lines.english: People tend to amass possessions, sometimes without being aware of doing so.
lines.chinese: 人们倾向于积累财产，有时甚至没有意识到自己在这样做。
lines.raw: People tend to amass possessions, sometimes without being aware of doing so. | 人们倾向于积累财产，有时甚至没有意识到自己在这样做。

lines.english: Indeed they can have a delightful surprise when they find something useful which they did not know they owned.
lines.chinese: 事实上，当他们发现一些自己并不知道拥有的有用物品时，他们会感到惊喜。
lines.raw: Indeed they can have a delightful surprise when they find something useful which they did not know they owned. | 事实上，当他们发现一些自己并不知道拥有的有用物品时，他们会感到惊喜。

lines.english: Those who never have to move house become indiscriminate collectors of what can only be described as clutter.
lines.chinese: 那些从不搬家的人成了不加选择的收藏者，而他们的收藏只能被称为杂物。
lines.raw: Those who never have to move house become indiscriminate collectors of what can only be described as clutter. | 那些从不搬家的人成了不加选择的收藏者，而他们的收藏只能被称为杂物。

lines.english: They leave unwanted objects in drawers, cupboards and attics for years, in the belief that they may one day need just those very things.
lines.chinese: 他们把不用的东西放在抽屉、碗柜和阁楼上好多年，相信总有一天会用上这些东西。
lines.raw: They leave unwanted objects in drawers, cupboards and attics for years, in the belief that they may one day need just those very things. | 他们把不用的东西放在抽屉、碗柜和阁楼上好多年，相信总有一天会用上这些东西。

lines.english: As they grow old, people also accumulate belongings for two other reasons,
lines.chinese: 随着年龄的增长，人们还因为另外两个原因而积累物品：
lines.raw: As they grow old, people also accumulate belongings for two other reasons, | 随着年龄的增长，人们还因为另外两个原因而积累物品：

lines.english: lack of physical and mental energy, both of which are essential in turning out and throwing away, and sentiment.
lines.chinese: 缺少清理和扔掉东西所必需的体力和精力，以及情感因素。
lines.raw: lack of physical and mental energy, both of which are essential in turning out and throwing away, and sentiment. | 缺少清理和扔掉东西所必需的体力和精力，以及情感因素。

lines.english: Things owned for a long time are full of associations with the past,
lines.chinese: 拥有了很久的东西，充满了与过去的联系，
lines.raw: Things owned for a long time are full of associations with the past, | 拥有了很久的东西，充满了与过去的联系，

lines.english: perhaps with relatives who are dead, and so they gradually acquire a value beyond their true worth.
lines.chinese: 也许与已故的亲人有关，因此它们逐渐获得超出其真实价值的价值。
lines.raw: perhaps with relatives who are dead, and so they gradually acquire a value beyond their true worth. | 也许与已故的亲人有关，因此它们逐渐获得超出其真实价值的价值。

lines.english: Some things are collected deliberately in the home in an attempt to avoid waste.
lines.chinese: 有些东西是人们为了避免浪费而特意在家中收藏的。
lines.raw: Some things are collected deliberately in the home in an attempt to avoid waste. | 有些东西是人们为了避免浪费而特意在家中收藏的。

lines.english: Among these I would list string and brown paper,
lines.chinese: 在这些东西中，我会列举麻线和牛皮纸，
lines.raw: Among these I would list string and brown paper, | 在这些东西中，我会列举麻线和牛皮纸，

lines.english: kept by thrifty people when a parcel has been opened, to save buying these two requisites.
lines.chinese: 节俭的人在包裹拆开后会把它们留下，以节省购买这两种必需品的钱。
lines.raw: kept by thrifty people when a parcel has been opened, to save buying these two requisites. | 节俭的人在包裹拆开后会把它们留下，以节省购买这两种必需品的钱。

lines.english: Collecting small items can easily become a mania.
lines.chinese: 收集小物品很容易变成一种癖好。
lines.raw: Collecting small items can easily become a mania. | 收集小物品很容易变成一种癖好。

lines.english: I know someone who always cuts sketches out from newspapers of model clothes that she would like to buy if she had the money.
lines.chinese: 我认识一个人，她总是从报纸上剪下她有钱就想买的服装款式图。
lines.raw: I know someone who always cuts sketches out from newspapers of model clothes that she would like to buy if she had the money. | 我认识一个人，她总是从报纸上剪下她有钱就想买的服装款式图。

lines.english: As she is not rich, the chances that she will ever be able to afford such purchases are remote;
lines.chinese: 由于她不富裕，她将来能买得起这些东西的可能性很小；
lines.raw: As she is not rich, the chances that she will ever be able to afford such purchases are remote; | 由于她不富裕，她将来能买得起这些东西的可能性很小；

lines.english: but she is never sufficiently strongminded to be able to stop the practice.
lines.chinese: 但她从没有足够的毅力来停止这种做法。
lines.raw: but she is never sufficiently strongminded to be able to stop the practice. | 但她从没有足够的毅力来停止这种做法。

lines.english: It is a harmless habit, but it litters up her desk to such an extent that every time she opens it, loose bits of paper fall out in every direction.
lines.chinese: 这是一种无害的习惯，但它把她的书桌弄得一团糟，以至于她每次打开书桌，散乱的纸片都会四处掉落。
lines.raw: It is a harmless habit, but it litters up her desk to such an extent that every time she opens it, loose bits of paper fall out in every direction. | 这是一种无害的习惯，但它把她的书桌弄得一团糟，以至于她每次打开书桌，散乱的纸片都会四处掉落。

lines.english: Collecting as a serious hobby is quite different and has many advantages.
lines.chinese: 作为一种严肃的爱好，收藏就完全不同了，它有很多优点。
lines.raw: Collecting as a serious hobby is quite different and has many advantages. | 作为一种严肃的爱好，收藏就完全不同了，它有很多优点。

lines.english: It provides relaxation for leisure hours, as just looking at one's treasures is always a joy.
lines.chinese: 它为闲暇时间提供了放松，因为仅仅看着自己的珍藏就是一种乐趣。
lines.raw: It provides relaxation for leisure hours, as just looking at one's treasures is always a joy. | 它为闲暇时间提供了放松，因为仅仅看着自己的珍藏就是一种乐趣。

lines.english: One does not have to go outside for amusement, since the collection is housed at home.
lines.chinese: 人不必外出寻找乐趣，因为藏品就放在家里。
lines.raw: One does not have to go outside for amusement, since the collection is housed at home. | 人不必外出寻找乐趣，因为藏品就放在家里。

lines.english: Whatever it consists of, stamps, records, first editions of books, china, glass,
lines.chinese: 无论是邮票、唱片、书籍初版、瓷器、玻璃制品、
lines.raw: Whatever it consists of, stamps, records, first editions of books, china, glass, | 无论是邮票、唱片、书籍初版、瓷器、玻璃制品、

lines.english: antique furniture, pictures, model cars, stuffed birds, toy animals, there is always something to do in connection with it,
lines.chinese: 古董家具、画作、模型汽车、填充鸟类、玩具动物，总有与它相关的事情可做，
lines.raw: antique furniture, pictures, model cars, stuffed birds, toy animals, there is always something to do in connection with it, | 古董家具、画作、模型汽车、填充鸟类、玩具动物，总有与它相关的事情可做，

lines.english: from finding the right place for the latest addition, to verifying facts in reference books.
lines.chinese: 从为最新藏品找到合适的位置，到在参考书中核实事实。
lines.raw: from finding the right place for the latest addition, to verifying facts in reference books. | 从为最新藏品找到合适的位置，到在参考书中核实事实。

lines.english: This hobby educates one not only in the chosen subject, but also in general matters which have some bearing on it.
lines.chinese: 这种爱好不仅能让人们在所选的领域受到教育，还能在与此相关的一般事务上学到知识。
lines.raw: This hobby educates one not only in the chosen subject, but also in general matters which have some bearing on it. | 这种爱好不仅能让人们在所选的领域受到教育，还能在与此相关的一般事务上学到知识。

lines.english: There are also other benefits.
lines.chinese: 还有其他好处。
lines.raw: There are also other benefits. | 还有其他好处。

lines.english: One wants to meet like-minded collectors, to get advice, to compare notes, to exchange articles, to show off the latest find.
lines.chinese: 人们会想结识志同道合的收藏家，以获取建议、交流心得、交换物品、炫耀最新的发现。
lines.raw: One wants to meet like-minded collectors, to get advice, to compare notes, to exchange articles, to show off the latest find. | 人们会想结识志同道合的收藏家，以获取建议、交流心得、交换物品、炫耀最新的发现。

lines.english: So one's circle of friends grows.
lines.chinese: 这样一来，朋友圈子就扩大了。
lines.raw: So one's circle of friends grows. | 这样一来，朋友圈子就扩大了。

lines.english: Soon the hobby leads to travel, perhaps to a meeting in another town,
lines.chinese: 很快，这项爱好就会带来旅行，也许是去另一个城市参加会议，
lines.raw: Soon the hobby leads to travel, perhaps to a meeting in another town, | 很快，这项爱好就会带来旅行，也许是去另一个城市参加会议，

lines.english: possibly a trip abroad in search of a rare specimen, for collectors are not confined to any one country.
lines.chinese: 也可能是出国旅行寻找稀有标本，因为收藏家并不局限于某个国家。
lines.raw: possibly a trip abroad in search of a rare specimen, for collectors are not confined to any one country. | 也可能是出国旅行寻找稀有标本，因为收藏家并不局限于某个国家。

lines.english: Over the years, one may well become an authority on one's hobby and will very probably be asked to give informal talks to little gatherings
lines.chinese: 多年以后，人们很可能成为自己爱好领域的权威人士，并且很可能会被邀请在小型聚会上做非正式的演讲，
lines.raw: Over the years, one may well become an authority on one's hobby and will very probably be asked to give informal talks to little gatherings | 多年以后，人们很可能成为自己爱好领域的权威人士，并且很可能会被邀请在小型聚会上做非正式的演讲，

lines.english: and then, if successful, to larger audiences.
lines.chinese: 然后，如果成功，还会面向更多的听众。
lines.raw: and then, if successful, to larger audiences. | 然后，如果成功，还会面向更多的听众。

lines.english: In this way self-confidence grows, first from mastering a subject, then from being able to talk about it.
lines.chinese: 这样，自信心就会增长，首先是掌握了一门学科，然后是能够谈论它。
lines.raw: In this way self-confidence grows, first from mastering a subject, then from being able to talk about it. | 这样，自信心就会增长，首先是掌握了一门学科，然后是能够谈论它。

lines.english: Collecting, by occupying spare time so constructively, makes a person contented, with no time for boredom.
lines.chinese: 收藏，通过如此建设性地占据了业余时间，使人感到满足，没有时间感到无聊。
lines.raw: Collecting, by occupying spare time so constructively, makes a person contented, with no time for boredom. | 收藏，通过如此建设性地占据了业余时间，使人感到满足，没有时间感到无聊。
